projects.name: Highness Global
projects.desc: A full redesign of the Highness Global flagship website. A bespoke portfolio site that highlights the various artworks of Highness' clients through high quality images and videos optimized for speed.

projects.name: Highness Publishing House
projects.desc: A full redesign of the Highness Publishing House website. A luxury E-commerce site that pushes the sales of Highness' published books and highlights its stellar network of Authors and Photographers.
